student.dataset_description: UCI Student Performance dataset (Open University). Predicts student final result (Pass/Fail/Distinction/Withdrawn). Contains demographic and behavioral columns. Many categorical columns with low cardinality. Student ID already removed.
must_do: encode_categorical with ordinal for tree-based efficiency
student.notes: Dataset domain: education. Categorical nature: mostly nominal with low cardinality (region, highest_education, disability). High-cardinality columns: code_module and code_presentation have moderate cardinality. ML model encoding guidance: Ordinal encoding is efficient and appropriate, same as Random Forest. GBM builds trees sequentially and benefits from compact feature representation. High-cardinality columns are better encoded as ordinal to avoid sparse feature matrices.
